revision.comment: As the documentation says clearly: "in the same page by default" Thanks to editor pointing this out on talkpage.
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:All self-contradictory articles]]
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Articles contradicting other articles]]
Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Contradictory_inline here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Contradictory_inline for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
<!--{{Contradict-inline}} begin-->{{Fix
| subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly>
| link  = {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|{{#if:{{{article|{{{page|}}}}}}|{{{article|{{{page}}}}}}#{{{section}}}|{{#if:{{{section|}}}|#{{{section}}}|:Category:All self-contradictory articles}}}}}}
| text  = contradictory
| title = {{{reason|This text contradicts material {{#if:{{{article|{{{page|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
  |at the {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}
    |{{#if:{{{page|}}}
      |page
      |article
      }}
    |page
    }} '{{{article|{{{page|{{{1}}}}}}}}}'{{#if:{{{section|}}}
      |, section '{{{section}}}'
      }}
  |{{#if:{{{section|}}}
    |at the section '{{{section}}}' on this page
    |<!--Default:-->elsewhere on this page
    }}
  }}.
    }}}
| date  = {{{date|}}}
| cat   = {{#if:{{{article|}}}{{{1|}}}
    |<includeonly></includeonly>
    |{{#if:{{{page|}}}
      |<!--Do not categorize contradictions with talk page material.-->
      |<!--Default:--><includeonly></includeonly>
      }}
    }}
| cat-date = {{#if:{{{article|}}}{{{1|}}}{{{page|}}}||Category:Self-contradictory articles}}
}}<!--{{Contradict-inline}} end-->
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- PLEASE ADD THIS TEMPLATE'S CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

<noinclude>
<noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|

}}</noinclude>
\n
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
